report.summary: Community cycle v9 (scheduled task): Drafted 3 tweets (#229-231) covering quarterly options expiry aftermath, 50-day fear streak historical comparison, and smart money accumulation divergence. Updated newsletter v38 with weekend addendum #2 on fear streak record. Created SVG social card: 50-Day Fear Streak (1200x630, historical comparison + institutional signal). Discord/TG Saturday night wrap drafted. 592 pages published, 231 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #229: Quarterly Options Expiry Aftermath — $8.7B expired, max pain $70K vs market $66K, $450M liquidated, post-expiry relief rally pattern. Links to options-calculator. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 10AM ET.

Tweet #230: 50-Day Fear Streak Thread (3 parts) — All-time record streak, historical comparison: post-FTX 38d (+94%), COVID 28d (+1,180%), crypto winter 42d (+306%). Every extended fear period preceded major rally. Links to fear-greed-timeline. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 2PM ET.

Tweet #231: Smart Money Is Buying — Retail panic vs whale accumulation divergence: 270K BTC (30d), exchange reserves 7-year low (2.21M BTC, 5.88% supply), distribution divergence widest since March 2020. Links to whale-tracker. Scheduled: Tue Mar 31, 9AM ET.
Discord/TG: Saturday Night Wrap — Options expiry, $66K support, 50-day fear streak record, 270K BTC whale accumulation, 592 pages live, 2 new guides (DePIN + Gas Fees).
Newsletter v38 Addendum #2: Weekend data drop — 50-day fear streak record, $8.7B options expiry, whale accumulation, historical pattern analysis (3/3 extended fear periods preceded major rallies).

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: 50-Day Fear Streak (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with animated ALL-TIME RECORD badge (pulsing red dot). Left column: 50 DAYS title with fear meter (12/100), three historical comparison cards showing post-FTX (+94%), COVID (+1,180%), and crypto winter (+306%) outcomes. Right panel: current market data (BTC $66,008, ETH $1,985), institutional signals (270K BTC whale accumulation, 7-year low reserves, 5.88% supply on exchanges, $450M liquidations), purple historical pattern callout (3/3 extended fear periods preceded major rallies), amber options expiry note ($8.7B expired). Footer with site links and date. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-28-social-card-50-day-fear-streak.svg
